meaning: adj.英明的,明智的,慎虑的,聪明的,博学的,明白的,贤明的,狡猾的vi.知道vt.告诉,劝导n.方法,方式
examples: She had made a very wise decision.
It's never wise to withhold evidence.
It was very wise to leave when you did.
Companies interested in achieving top performance would be wise to support employees in these endeavors.
And since Schiff sees the dollar continuing to wilt, foreign debt is more than a wise short-term strategy.
